headline: Data Center UPS Market Research and Global Forecast Report 2026-2036: 5G Edge Infrastructure, Hyperscale Facility Growth and Advanced Grid Monitoring Technologies Unlock New Opportunities
summary: The 'Data Center UPS Market by Topology,' report forecasts significant growth, reaching USD 11.86 billion by 2036, at a CAGR of 6.8% from 2026. Key growth drivers include the surge in AI, cloud computing, and 5G infrastructure. The study dissects market trends, segmenting by topology (online double conversion, line-interactive), modularity (modular, monoblock), battery type (VRLA, lithium-ion), and application (hyperscale, colocation).
